subcodes.first_line: O dear handmaid of God! The letter that was composed on 3 July 1916 hath arrived. Its contents rejoiced my heart and soul to the utmost
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه که بتاریخ ۳ جولای ۱۹۱۶ مرقوم بود وصول یافت از مضمون
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
